text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. Thanks for the day off!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
By the way, do you have time right now? I found
this awesome music video yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I thought you might like it too. Can I show you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City seems sufficiently refreshed. She must
have been able to enjoy her day off.
